text.title: trade-off-quality-attributes Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trade-off-quality-attributes as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: "Everything wins" ADRs that claim a decision improves all quality attributes with no sacrifice.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hidden sacrifices surface as production incidents the team did not anticipate. Force the author to name a Sacrificial attribute.

failure-mode.description: Choosing AP storage for a financial ledger to "stay available".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Eventual consistency on money-movement causes data loss on partition recovery. Use CP and a queue for back-pressure instead.

failure-mode.description: Adopting microservices for a 5-engineer team to "scale later".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Operational overhead degrades Maintainability and team velocity before any scale benefit materializes. Start with a Modular Monolith.

failure-mode.description: Using full async/event-driven communication everywhere by default.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Eventual consistency and complex tracing impose a Maintainability tax that is unjustified for low-traffic synchronous flows.
